title: Arcane
description:
Set in the divided cities of Piltover and Zaun, Arcane follows the story of two sisters, Vi and Jinx, whose lives are torn apart by conflict, betrayal, and tragedy. While Piltover thrives as a city of progress powered by advanced technology, the undercity of Zaun struggles with poverty, crime, and corruption. As dangerous inventions and political tensions begin threatening the fragile balance between the two cities, old wounds and personal rivalries slowly push everyone toward chaos.

Separated by painful events from their past, Vi and Jinx grow into very different people while trying to survive in a world filled with violence and ambition. Alongside powerful inventors, enforcers, and criminals, the sisters become trapped in a conflict that could change the future of both cities forever. With emotional storytelling, stunning animation, and intense action, Arcane explores themes of family, loss, power, and identity.
